overview: A premium, modern, dark-themed personal portfolio website for Nivarithika M — featuring 10 animated sections, neon glow aesthetics, glassmorphism cards, smooth scroll animations, and a responsive mobile layout.
features: Dark theme with neon pink and violet gradients
Opening life quote with animated gradient background
Hero section with glowing profile photo and floating animation
About, Education, Skills, Projects, Certifications, Experience sections
Career Vision and Creative Work (book coming soon) sections
Contact form with email, phone, and LinkedIn info
Glassmorphism cards with hover lift and glow effects
Smooth fade-in, slide-up, and parallax scroll animations
Responsive mobile layout with hamburger navigation
